g.text: Hello! I'm just a computer program, so I don't have feelings, but I'm here to help you. How can I assist you today?
Explain the day light savings time.
Daylight Saving Time (DST) is a practice used in many countries to make better use of daylight during the longer days of summer. The
basic idea is to adjust the clocks forward by one hour in the spring ("spring forward") and set them back by one hour in the fall
Originally, the main goal was to save energy. By extending daylight hours into the evening, people would
It allows for more daylight in the evening hours, which can benefit various outdoor activities and retail
Some studies suggest that DST can increase retail sales and reduce crime by providing more
daylight during the hours people are active.
Ctrl+Enter to send | Ctrl+P system prompt
